families.description: Critical-care database family containing versioned core database lines and stand-alone sibling modules such as ECHO.
families.future_member_rule: Add future core versions as new database_id rows under the same family. Keep sibling modules separate from core-version rows.
families.alignment_rule: Cross-member alignment should use explicit identifiers and documented time-alignment notes, not directory nesting.

families.description: Standalone ICU database family whose versions must keep critical relative-time semantics explicit.
families.future_member_rule: Add future Amsterdam releases as new versioned database_id rows. Re-review timing assumptions rather than inheriting them blindly.
families.alignment_rule: Cross-version or companion-module alignment must explicitly preserve version-scoped time semantics.

families.description: Standalone ICU database family staged from the SICdb CSV delivery with case-level identifiers, offset-time fields, and source reference dictionaries.
families.future_member_rule: Add future SICdb versions as new versioned database_id rows. Re-review ID, offset-time, and source dictionary assumptions for each version.
families.alignment_rule: Cross-version or cross-database alignment must use standardized IDs and documented offset-time interpretation, not raw field-name similarity.

families.description: Standalone ICU database family staged from the NWICU delivery with MIMIC-like patient, admission, stay, event, and dictionary tables.
families.future_member_rule: Add future NWICU versions as new versioned database_id rows. Preserve declared-version and source-folder-label provenance for each intake.
families.alignment_rule: Cross-version or cross-database alignment must use standardized IDs and documented timestamp interpretation, not raw field-name similarity.

families.description: Standalone ICU database family staged from the eICU Collaborative Research Database delivery with patient-unit-stay identifiers, offset-time event tables, hospital/site context, and source-supplied APACHE surfaces.
families.future_member_rule: Add future eICU-CRD versions as new versioned database_id rows. Re-review ICU-stay identity, offset-time semantics, hospital/site fields, and APACHE source-supplied score surfaces for each version.
families.alignment_rule: Cross-version or cross-database alignment must use standardized IDs and documented offset-time interpretation, not raw field-name similarity.

families.description: Standalone ICU database family staged from the Zigong CSV delivery with patient identifiers, inpatient encounter identifiers, hour-offset fields, source dictionary metadata, and wide nursing charting.
families.future_member_rule: Add future Zigong versions as new versioned database_id rows. Re-review patient/admission identity, offset-time semantics, outcome definitions, and dictionary usage for each version.
families.alignment_rule: Cross-version or cross-database alignment must use standardized IDs and documented offset-time interpretation, not raw field-name similarity.

databases.relationship_note: Primary MIMIC-IV critical-care database module covering core, ICU, ED, and note deliveries under the current Layer 1 conventions. Local Layer 4 opening registry build completed on 2026-05-09 and is pending owner review.
databases.public_layer4_support_status: public MIMIC source-package boundary contract published; local Layer 4 opening registry built pending owner review
databases.public_layer5_public_status: broad reviewed-approved local assets exist and public std-variable cards are published
databases.current_local_stage: mature retained-variable coverage with cross-database public-card export; local Layer 4 opening registry built pending owner review

databases.relationship_note: Stand-alone sibling module for echocardiography material. It should not be semantically version-owned by the MIMIC-IV-3.1 directory path. Local Layer 4 opening registry build completed on 2026-05-09 and is pending owner review.
databases.public_layer4_support_status: local Layer 4 opening registry built pending owner review; ECHO-specific public opening policy not yet published
databases.public_layer5_public_status: database-level local notes exist, but no reviewed-approved retained-variable family has been published yet
databases.current_local_stage: stand-alone Layer 1/2 module established; local Layer 4 opening registry built pending owner review; retained-variable design not yet started

databases.relationship_note: Standalone ICU database with critical relative-time semantics that must stay explicit from Layer 2 onward.
databases.public_layer4_support_status: database opening policy registry contract and validator path are published
databases.public_layer5_public_status: pilot reviewed-approved local assets exist and public std-variable cards are published for shared variables
databases.current_local_stage: active pilot retained-variable approvals with explicit opening and mortality contracts
